message:
fix: Add missing VPCLMULQDQ macro to disable all AVX-512 code

- Add -DLIBDEFLATE_ASSEMBLER_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_VPCLMULQDQ
- Previous commit only disabled VNNI, but VPCLMULQDQ controls CRC32
- CRC32 has separate AVX-512 implementations guarded by this macro
- Both macros needed to fully disable AVX-512 compilation

The crc32_impl.h file (line 94-95) checks:
  !defined(LIBDEFLATE_ASSEMBLER_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_VPCLMULQDQ)

This controls both vl256 and vl512 AVX-512 implementations.
